questions.question_text: When a capable agent fails, what does the field guide say to fix FIRST?
questions.correct_answer: The harness — the environment the agent runs inside

options.option_text: Swap in a bigger / smarter model
The harness — the environment the agent runs inside
Rewrite the user's prompt and retry

questions.question_text: Which of the five harness subsystems is described as 'the weakest link almost everywhere'?
questions.correct_answer: Feedback (how the agent learns it succeeded)

options.option_text: Feedback (how the agent learns it succeeded)

questions.question_text: A Definition of Done written in prose is as reliable as one that is a runnable command.
The Cold-Start Test asks whether a fresh agent, given ONLY the repository, can answer how many questions?
